title: SWD Cricket: Promotion, reserve and women's league results
description: CRICKET NEWS - Pirates United remained on the top of the table of the SWD Cricket promotion league after a 153-run bonus point victory against Ramblers on Saturday 24 January. There were also
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS  - Pirates United remained on the top of the table of the SWD Cricket promotion league after a 153-run bonus point victory against Ramblers on Saturday 24 January.

There were also victories for Ladismith (beat Heidelberg United by eight wickets) and George B (beat Riversdale by one wicket).

In the Women’s Division 1 Pacaltsdorp United defeated George by six wickets and Sussex won by 10 wickets against Knysna Cavaliers.

Pirates United 278/4 (50 overs); Ramblers 125 all out (27.5 overs)

Heidelberg United 143 all out (21.1 overs); Ladismith 144/2 (16 overs)

Riversdale 160 all out (26.3 overs); George B 161/9 (37.5 overs)

Union Stars B 84 all out (33 overs); Bongolethu 85/5 (18.3 overs)

Harlequin’s Forces C 91 all out (21.5 overs); Beaufort West A 95/7

Kwanonqaba 133 all out (29.3 overs); Western Hope 137/0 (15.5 overs)

Melkhoutfontein 137 all out (28.4 overs); Hartenbos 139/8 (24.3 overs)

Calitzdorp Young Stars A beat Harlequins Forces B with 332 runs:

Calitzdorp Young Stars A 374 all out (37.5 overs); Harlequins Forces B 42 all out (19 overs)

Ramblers B 273 all out (38.5 overs); Hartenbos B 199 all out (37.1 overs)

Plett Pioneers C 69 all out (18.3 overs); Knysna Cavaliers C 70/1 (14.4 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers B 258/8 (40 overs); Pirates United B 176/6 (40 overs)
